description:
# proto.config.yaml Schema & Loader

Define the proto.config.yaml schema, create the loader in libs/platform, and wire it into the setup pipeline. This is the foundation — the CRDT sync project depends on this schema.

## Phases
1. ProtoConfig types and YAML schema
2. Config loader with layered resolution
3. Wire config generation into setup_lab
title: [Epic] proto.config.yaml Schema & Loader
